# Suya Nakış

> Interactive Digital Ebru Studio by Faramarz Kowsari.

Suya Nakış is an open-source browser application inspired by the traditional
Turkish art of Ebru. It combines creative coding, procedural graphics, HTML5
Canvas interaction, browser narration, a 100-phase demonstration and PNG
artwork export.

## Canonical website

https://faramarzkowsari.github.io/suya-nakis/

## Source repository

https://github.com/FaramarzKowsari/suya-nakis

## Permanent identifier

DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21123598

## Author

Faramarz Kowsari is an author, Software Engineer and AI researcher based in
Istanbul. He works at the intersection of technology, education, personal
growth, Artificial Intelligence, prompt engineering, algorithmic trading,
classical literature, mindfulness, interactive education and cultural
technology.

## Official author profiles

- Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q140389378
